user_model_brief: Prefers autonomous tooling that escalates to ask when its own confidence is genuinely low rather than guessing. Values convention-consistency with the existing flag-based, fragment-based skill architecture. Wants hardening/robustness over speed. Subsequent passes exist to fill gaps and harden the plan. Wants a numeric convergence metric and a PNG chart emitted with the report.

branches.topic: Outer-loop control flow, invocation, and termination

decisions.question: Opt-in flag vs default
decisions.answer: Opt-in bare boolean flag --harden; normal runs unchanged

decisions.question: Context-clearing mechanism
decisions.answer: Thin outer orchestrator loop; each pass = fresh isolated sub-agent re-examining the artifacts

decisions.question: Stop criterion
decisions.answer: Convergence judge classifies material vs minor; stop when only-minor AND no open gaps

decisions.question: Re-feed scope per pass
decisions.answer: Full artifact set (spec + ADRs + plan) re-examined each pass

decisions.question: Interactivity during passes
decisions.answer: Passes may escalate low-confidence questions; non-interactive pass agents bubble up to the interactive orchestrator which prompts the user

decisions.question: Purpose of subsequent passes
decisions.answer: Fill all gaps and harden the plan; meaningful = fills gap / resolves UNRESOLVED / hardens interface or edge case / changes a decision

decisions.question: Artifact output strategy
decisions.answer: Overwrite in place; keep per-pass snapshots; changelog in state/report

decisions.question: Pass budget flag
decisions.answer: --max-passes, default 3, bounds passes; distinct from --max-iterations (in-pass grill cycles)

decisions.question: Where the loop lives
decisions.answer: New Phase 5 'Hardening Meta-Loop' wrapper; Pass 1 = normal full run (interactive Phase 0.5), Passes 2+ = Hardening Pass agent (fresh non-interactive)

decisions.question: Flag composition matrix
decisions.answer: Legal: --skip-plan, --plan-only, --resume, --confidence-threshold, --auto-commit. Illegal: --dry-run (hard error). --redo independent (no auto-re-harden)

decisions.question: Input modes for --harden
decisions.answer: Works from topic string (pass 1 full incl Phase 0.5) and from spec file (pass 1 grills the spec)

decisions.question: Hardening Pass agent nesting
decisions.answer: Streamlined single-context review-and-patch; does NOT re-invoke the skill or spawn sub-agents; reads full artifact set + decision log + constraints + brief + prior summaries; returns proposed edits (full-file bodies); model opus

decisions.question: Write vs propose + ordering
decisions.answer: Pass agent proposes; orchestrator owns ordering snapshot -> apply -> state-rewrite -> judge

decisions.question: New fragments
decisions.answer: HARDENING-PASS-PROTOCOL.md, HARDENING-PASS-RESPONSE-TEMPLATE.md, CONVERGENCE-JUDGE-CHECKLIST.md

decisions.question: Pass response template headers
decisions.answer: Edits / Decisions Changed / Gaps Filled / Unresolved Resolved / ADR Candidates / Bubble-Up Questions / Material Change Assessment

decisions.question: Prevent cosmetic churn
decisions.answer: Pass agent only proposes Material edits; standalone minor edits forbidden -> guarantees convergence

decisions.question: Judge inputs + trust
decisions.answer: Inputs = snapshot(N-1) + current(N) + pass summary; judge independently diffs, summary only a cross-check

decisions.question: Material vs minor rubric
decisions.answer: In CONVERGENCE-JUDGE-CHECKLIST.md. Material = decision/scope/interface/edge-case/UNRESOLVED/ADR/threshold change; minor = wording/format/reorder. Conservative bias: ambiguous -> material

decisions.question: Judge cadence + baseline + output + model
decisions.answer: Runs every pass; Snapshot-0 = pre-harden Phase 4 output so it runs after pass 1; model opus; output Verdict CONVERGED/NOT CONVERGED + Changes table + Open Gaps + Rationale

decisions.question: Convergence stop condition (precise)
decisions.answer: converged = material_changes==0 AND open_gaps==0 AND no UNRESOLVED markers AND no pending bubble-up questions

decisions.question: Termination conditions
decisions.answer: converged | max_passes_reached | oscillation | hard failure; each emits most-hardened/last-good artifacts + report status

decisions.question: Oscillation ownership + detection
decisions.answer: Orchestrator-owned (judge stateless pairwise); detect pass-N material-change fingerprint == pass-(N-2)'s via fingerprints stored in state

decisions.question: Pass failure handling
decisions.answer: Retry once; failed pass does not consume --max-passes; 2 consecutive failures -> abort, keep last-good artifacts

decisions.question: State schema extension
decisions.answer: Top-level harden object {enabled, max_passes, current_pass, convergence_status, snapshots_dir, passes[]}; convergence_status in {in_progress,converged,max_passes_reached,escalated,oscillation,interrupted}; two-phase write (running before pass, complete after judge); full rewrite each pass

decisions.question: Snapshot storage + retention + filename
decisions.answer: Plain file copies under docs/auto-plan/reports/snapshots/pass-N/; retention last 2; filename date frozen at pass-1 date; artifacts overwritten in place

decisions.question: --resume re-entry
decisions.answer: Reads harden.convergence_status + current_pass; a 'running' last entry = interrupted -> restore from snapshot, re-run that pass

decisions.question: --redo interaction
decisions.answer: Operates on decision log independent of harden loop; no auto-re-harden; creates no new snapshots

decisions.question: Escalation contract + handling
decisions.answer: Pass returns '### Bubble-Up Questions' (mirrors Griller Unresolved). Orchestrator asks user immediately (batched), saves answers as feedback memories + settled decisions (source user/bubble-up); NEXT pass applies them (record-and-defer; no mid-pass re-dispatch)

decisions.question: Confidence gating of bubble-up
decisions.answer: Tied to --confidence-threshold: low=never bubble (->UNRESOLVED), medium=novel material trade-offs, high=all material, paranoid=everything; gate enforced orchestrator-side + advisory to pass

decisions.question: Unattended mode
decisions.answer: --unattended flag (default off) + best-effort auto-detect when no interactive channel; bubble-up degrades to UNRESOLVED, loop never blocks

decisions.question: Bubble-up dedup + deferral
decisions.answer: Orchestrator dedups already-answered/deferred questions via fuzzy match; deferred/skipped -> UNRESOLVED, not re-asked; only pending (awaiting-answer) questions block convergence

decisions.question: Bubble-up answer contradicts settled decision
decisions.answer: Reuse --redo invalidation cascade (invalidate + depends_on walk + >60% re-plan warning)

decisions.question: --auto-commit granularity under --harden
decisions.answer: Commit once per pass (whole artifact set), message 'auto-plan harden pass N: <verdict>'; otherwise ask once at harden start

decisions.question: Convergence metric
decisions.answer: instability_score(pass) = material_changes + open_gaps + pending_questions + unresolved_markers; converges to 0 (numeric restatement of stop condition); per-pass metrics stored in harden.passes[].metrics; emitted as CSV always

decisions.question: Convergence chart
decisions.answer: Best-effort PNG docs/auto-plan/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-convergence.png: line chart of instability_score + components vs pass number; render via python3/matplotlib, fallback gnuplot, fallback CSV + ASCII sparkline in report (mirrors dot -Tpng best-effort); report embeds it in Hardening Passes section

decisions.question: Documentation surface
decisions.answer: Update SKILL.md (config table, phase matrix, Phase 5 section, collection logic, state schema, report), README, CLAUDE.md (fragment table + new contract); register 3 new fragments

harden.note: This state file documents the design of --harden; it was produced by a single (non-hardened) planning run.
